CEO Blog Diary

From the
CEO's Desk

"The evolution of technology lies within each and every part of culture, religion, politics, and our very being. We bask in it."

JUNE 2026

The Death of Humanity Lies in Convenience

Throughout civilisation, technology has always influenced man. Hence we are where we are. No questions asked. Despite the history of man's flaws, this has always been a snowball — curiosity, wealth, power — now pushed that itty-bitty ball down the hill.

From the Stone Age to the AI age in under 10,000 years. Global temperatures have risen 1.1°C since pre-industrial times. The last decade was the warmest on record.

"As an avid environmentalist, we now ask all business ventures to apply 6% revenue from a segment of any business we do business with. We hold this dear to our hearts. It is the least we can do to give back to both the population and Earth."

Source: IPCC AR6 WG1 2021 | NASA Climate Evidence

▶ Enter Business Community Your Say
Gods Share

Gods Share — 20%

Of the 6%, 20% goes to Gods Share — our autonomous charity initiative. Gods Share checks world news and sends funds where needed most. Even better — a business that deals with the issue creates more revenue for the charity. The remaining 80% goes directly to admin resources, payouts to voluntary employees, and the structure itself.

"This is not optional. This is the cost of doing business with Aether. This is how we build a better world while building better businesses."
